raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Evoking the transformative power of sustained maternal intention and visualization during gestation",
  "implicit_claims": ["Focused mental imagery can shape biological outcomes such as fetal sex", "Repeated maternal visualization directly imprints desired physical and moral traits on the developing child"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent as a prescriptive metaphor linking mind and progeny, though the causal mechanism described is biologically implausible",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "If read as encouragement for positive maternal mindset, emotional bonding, or psychological preparation rather than literal causation",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "If taken as an empirical instruction capable of controlling chromosomal sex or heritable traits"
}
